'''yanuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uzhe|uzhe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uzhe|uzhe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yanuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænithith|yænithith]] || [[word:yænithij|yænithij]] || [[word:yænithish|yænithish]] || [[word:yænithi|yænithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanunuthuth|yanunuthuth]] || [[word:yanunuthuj|yanunuthuj]] || [[word:yanunuthush|yanunuthush]] || [[word:yanunuthu|yanunuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanuthuth|yanuthuth]] || [[word:yanuthuj|yanuthuj]] || [[word:yanuthush|yanuthush]] || [[word:yanuthu|yanuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanufthuth|yanufthuth]] || [[word:yanufthuj|yanufthuj]] || [[word:yanufthush|yanufthush]] || [[word:yanufthuf|yanufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanuthuthu|yanuthuthu]] || [[word:yanuthuju|yanuthuju]] || [[word:yanuthushu|yanuthushu]] || [[word:yanuthuku|yanuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanuthuth|yanuthuth]] || [[word:yanuthuj|yanuthuj]] || [[word:yanuthush|yanuthush]] || [[word:yanuthu|yanuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanuthuthul|yanuthuthul]] || [[word:yanuthujul|yanuthujul]] || [[word:yanuthushul|yanuthushul]] || [[word:yanuthukul|yanuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanuthuthuthu|yanuthuthuthu]] || [[word:yanuthujuju|yanuthujuju]] || [[word:yanuthushushu|yanuthushushu]] || [[word:yanuthuku|yanuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanuthuthun|yanuthuthun]] || [[word:yanuthujun|yanuthujun]] || [[word:yanuthushun|yanuthushun]] || [[word:yanuthukun|yanuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanuthuthuoro|yanuthuthuoro]] || [[word:yanuthujuoro|yanuthujuoro]] || [[word:yanuthushuoro|yanuthushuoro]] || [[word:yanuthukuoro|yanuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
